overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through ancient Alexandria. The character descends from an upper terrace through a stone stairway, crosses a sunlit harbor plaza with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance, passes through a colonnaded market, and approaches a grand monumental staircase. The environment features Greco-Roman architecture, palm trees, and populated with NPCs in period clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide stone stairway descending to harbor

events.description: exits enclosed stairway walls into open harbor plaza with mosaic pavement

agents.ego_description: walking down wide stone stairs toward the harbor with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible ahead

entered.detail: wide stone steps with patterned edges descending between high walls
tall stone block wall with vegetation on top
tall stone block wall with a white stone lion statue at base
tall white marble lighthouse tower visible in the distance across the harbor
large stone building with carved relief and blue doors

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide stone stairway flanked by high walls, moving from an upper terrace toward the harbor. The Lighthouse of Alexandria dominates the distant skyline across the water. The scene transitions from the enclosed stairway to an open plaza with mosaic pavement as the character reaches the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor plaza with roman civic building

events.description: character turns left toward the colonnaded building, leaving the direct path to the lighthouse
moves from open plaza into area with market carts and commercial activity

agents.ego_description: crossing the sunlit plaza and turning toward a Roman-style building with tall columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking past the character toward the stairs

entered.detail: open paved area with geometric mosaic patterns in white and dark stones
classical temple-front building with tall stone columns and pediment
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels loaded with stone blocks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open harbor plaza with intricate mosaic pavement, passing a pedestrian in green clothing. The camera turns left toward a grand Roman building with tall columns, moving away from the direct view of the lighthouse. Wooden market carts and stone pine trees line the approach to the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market colonnade with red awnings

events.description: enters covered colonnade with stone pillars and red canvas awnings
exits the colonnade into open storage yard with cargo crates

agents.ego_description: walking through the market colonnade past merchants and tables displaying goods

notable_agents.action: vendor in white tunic arranging goods at wooden market stall
seated merchant behind table with scrolls and pottery

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillars supporting the roof structure
red and orange fabric canopies stretched between columns providing shade
wooden booth with hanging goods and storage chests
wooden table displaying rolled papyrus scrolls and pottery vessels

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered market colonnade supported by massive stone columns and shaded by red canvas awnings. Merchants tend to wooden stalls and tables displaying scrolls and pottery. The harbor is visible through the columns to the right as the character moves through the moderate crowd of browsing NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor storage yard leading to monumental staircase

events.description: enters grand plaza with monumental staircase and large marble statues
camera faces directly into bright sun causing lens flare and backlit silhouettes

agents.ego_description: walking through the cargo storage area toward a grand staircase with a large marble statue

notable_agents.action: man in purple tunic walking alongside and gesturing with his hand
child in blue clothing running up the grand staircase

entered.detail: stacks of square linen-wrapped bales and wooden cargo boxes
large spoked wooden wheels leaning against cargo stacks
wide monumental stone staircase leading up to a temple-like building
tall white marble statue of a winged figure holding a staff

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a harbor storage yard filled with stacked cargo bales and wooden cart wheels, exiting the market colonnade. The scene opens into a grand plaza featuring a monumental staircase flanked by a large winged marble statue. The camera faces directly into the bright midday sun, creating a lens flare as the character approaches the stairs where a child runs upward and a man in purple walks alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed stone descent into the expansive, sun-drenched plazas of ancient Alexandria. It begins as the character descends a wide stone stairway flanked by high walls, moving from an upper terrace toward a distant view of the Lighthouse of Alexandria before emerging onto an open plaza with intricate mosaic pavement. As the camera turns away from the harbor, the scene shifts toward a grand Roman building lined with stone pine trees and wooden carts, leading the character into a shaded market colonnade under red canvas awnings. The movement then flows through the crowded market and a storage yard filled with cargo bales, finally opening into a vast plaza. The shot concludes as the camera faces the bright midday sun, creating a lens flare while approaching a monumental staircase flanked by a winged marble statue.
